DP.032.0000:
Pokémon are wonderful, deeply
mysterious creatures.\f
But to Trainers, it seems the only
thing that matters is battling!
DP.032.0001:
Hello there, Trainer!\f
If you get stumped and don’t know
what to do...\f
Talk to people!
Talk to everyone you see!\f
Go places!
Go wherever you can!\f
You’ll find many new places by
doing just that.
